name_cn:
『Celine』
CELINE Tote Bag
Looks great as a handbag or shoulder bag with a stylish vibe!
The vintage print matches any outfit perfectly and is suitable for all seasons.
You can be sweet or edgy.
The vintage print trend is sweeping the world this year.
Owning this will definitely make you the most talked-about fashionista.
Size: 17*21cm
